When the quality of the products change s, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

5.0 28/05/2025 All 
[EIS November 2025: IBI-V6 
version] 
First release of the IBI-MFC MY 
PHY/BGC-V6 product.  
Temporal coverage from 
01/01/1993 to 12/12/2023. 
Increased spatial resolution from 
1/12° to 1/36°. 
Updated physical and 
biogeochemical components. 
Improved boundary conditions. 
Revised river inputs and permanent 
burial. 
New variable: light attenuation. 
E. Gutknecht 
R. Reffray 
B. Levier 
R. Escudier 
S. Cailleau 
S. Ciliberti
